system_init(CHANDRABAL_C)

Chandrabal C

Embedded Systems Engineer

Innovative Embedded Systems Engineer specializing in IoT systems, microcontrollers (ESP32, ATmega328p), and custom hardware design using KiCad. Focused on writing robust Embedded C firmware and engineering functional 2-layer PCB layouts.

Download Resume Contact Me
ESP32-S3
01 / Profile

About Me

I am an innovative Embedded Systems Engineer (2025 Graduate) with hands-on experience developing microcontrollers-based IoT platforms and custom circuit layouts. I excel at bridging the gap between firmware instructions and physical silicon nodes.

My technical focus lies in writing clean, structured Embedded C codes and building multi-layer schematics using KiCad. I have configured, integrated, and validated various sensor grids, communication networks, and motor systems.

"Fascinated by designing compact, low-power hardware configurations that solve real-world industrial and commercial challenges."

Currently expanding my expertise in advanced ARM processors (STM32 stack) and structural RTOS architecture systems to build high-speed, secure IoT deployments.

2025
ECE Graduate
5+
PCBs Designed
3+

02 / Journey

Work Experience

October 2025 - Present

Embedded Trainee

Yalamanchili Software Exports
  • Developing firmware for ESP32 and ATmega328p based smart applications.
  • Designing high-integrity hardware schematics and 2-layer PCB layouts using KiCad.
  • Performing hardware-software integration, system test validations, and debugs using Multimeters and Logic Analyzers.
ESP32 ATmega328p Embedded C KiCad Logic Analyzers
2021 - 2025

ECE Engineering Student

Anna University (UCE)
  • Acquired foundational knowledge in electronic circuitry, digital logic, VLSI, and signal communication networks.
  • Developed multiple laboratory prototypes using Arduino boards, sensor interfaces, and basic IoT modules.
  • Actively structured hardware-software implementations for smart systems.
Electronics Arduino IDE IoT Basics Circuit Debugging

04 / Hardware logs

Projects

ESP32 Ultrasonic Sensor IoT

Smart Water Tank Monitoring System

Automated water level detection system utilizing ESP32 and ultrasonic nodes, featuring deep-sleep battery optimizations and ThingSpeak cloud telemetry logging.

Hardware Stack: ESP32 MCU, HC-SR04 Sensor, Buck Converter Firmware Stack: Embedded C, ThingSpeak API, HTTP/MQTT
ESP32 PWM Motors Interface Design

Smart Vending Machine System

Firmware architecture for automated product dispensing using PWM motor configurations, relays, LCD user feeds, and matrix keypad scan loops.

Hardware Stack: ESP32, 4x4 Keypad, 16x2 LCD, Relays Firmware Stack: Embedded C, Keypad Scanner, PWM Drivers
Embedded System IR Sensors Low Power

Smart Parking System

Real-time parking slot management tracker utilizing IR presence detectors, optimized polling speed triggers, and a unified status terminal layout.

Hardware Stack: ATmega328p / ESP32 MCU, IR Sensors, LEDs Firmware Stack: Embedded C, Polling Optimization, Low Power
Education

Academic Path

2021 - 2025

B.E - Electronics and Communication Engineering

University College of Engineering, Anna University

Focused on hardware architectures, VLSI design, communication systems, and microcontrollers. CGPA: 7.3

Key Achievements

Cloud Datastream Integration

05 / Sheet Preview

Curriculum Vitae

CHANDRABAL C

Embedded Systems Engineer

Chennai, India | chandrabal2104@gmail.com

+91 - 9751720948 | linkedin.com/in/chandrabal

Innovative Embedded Systems Engineer (2025 Graduate) with hands-on experience in ESP32, ATmega328p, and IoT development. Proficient in Embedded C and hardware design using KiCad. Proven ability to develop real-time firmware and design custom PCBs for industrial and IoT applications.

Technical Skills

Microcontrollers
ESP32, ESP8266, ATmega328p, STM32 (Learning)
Languages & Protocols
C, Embedded C, Python (Basics) | I2C, SPI, UART, MQTT, HTTP
Tools & Hardware
KiCad (PCB Layout), Arduino IDE, VS Code (PlatformIO) | Circuit Debug, Sensor Interfacing, Soldering

Work Experience

Oct 2025 - Present
Embedded Trainee, Yalamanchili Software Exports
Developing ESP32/ATmega firmware, designing 2-layer PCBs in KiCad, debugging using multimeters and logic analyzers.

Academic Projects

IoT Tank Monitor
Automated tank sensor node using ESP32, HC-SR04 ultrasonic levels, and ThingSpeak MQTT pushes.
Vending Machine
Dispensing system using ESP32, relays, motor controllers, keypads, and LCD matrix.
